official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the change_difficulty packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, decoding, and writing the change_difficulty body without initialized game state.
Official binary source for the difficulty and locked body shape.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound change_difficulty frame.

field_notes.fixture: Uses official ClientboundChangeDifficultyPacket(Difficulty, boolean). The fixture is a context-free record constructor and does not require an initialized Level or game state.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound change_difficulty packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official difficulty/locked fixture only; do not infer difficulty UI behavior, hardcore semantics, initialized game state, spawn readiness, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
